title: Reflex Happy Thoughts
subtitlePlaying: Round {{current}}/{{total}}: Test your happy thoughts reflexes!
readyText2: You have {{time}} seconds for each question.
readyText3: You have {{total}} questions with {{time}} seconds each!

questions.text: You make a mistake while drawing in class. Which thought helps you feel better quickly?

options.text: I feel angry and throw the paper
I can try again and improve

questions.text: Your friend does not want to play today. What is the healthiest thought?

options.text: We can play together another day
I will stop being their friend

questions.text: You feel nervous before a school test. Which thought keeps your mind calm?

options.text: I prepared and will do my best
I want to skip the test

questions.text: Someone wins a prize instead of you. What thought shows a happy mindset?

options.text: I am happy for their success

questions.text: You wake up feeling tired in the morning. Which thought starts the day positively?

options.text: I will take the day one step at a time
I do not want to do anything
